args.code:
import json

# Company information
companies = {
    "FTR": "Frontier Communications Corporation",
    "APEX": "Apex Global Brands Inc.",
    "BKYI": "BIO-key International, Inc.",
    "CBAT": "CBAK Energy Technology, Inc.",
    "CCCL": "China Ceramics Co., Ltd.",
    "CORV": "Correvio Pharma Corp.",
    "CPAH": "CounterPath Corporation",
    "DZSI": "DASAN Zhone Solutions, Inc.",
    "FTFT": "Future FinTech Group Inc.",
    "IDEX": "Ideanomics, Inc.",
    "OPTT": "Ocean Power Technologies, Inc.",
    "PEIX": "Pacific Ethanol, Inc.",
    "SES": "Synthesis Energy Systems, Inc.",
    "SNSS": "Sunesis Pharmaceuticals, Inc.",
    "SYPR": "Sypris Solutions, Inc."
}

# Average daily trading volumes for 2008
volumes = {
    "FTR": 254397.63,
    "APEX": 23781.42,
    "BKYI": 10988.14,
    "CBAT": 86223.32,
    "CCCL": 4366.80,
    "CORV": 145247.83,
    "CPAH": 375.49,
    "DZSI": 15578.66,
    "FTFT": 9.85,
    "IDEX": 10.28,
    "OPTT": 254.15,
    "PEIX": 10706.72,
    "SES": 2390.51,
    "SNSS": 781.82,
    "SYPR": 36836.36
}

# Create sorted list by company name
sorted_companies = sorted(companies.keys(), key=lambda x: companies[x])

# Build final report text
final_text = "NASDAQ-listed companies that were financially troubled and had trading volume in 2008:\n\n"
for ticker in sorted_companies:
    company_name = companies[ticker]
    avg_volume = volumes[ticker]
    formatted_vol = "%.2f" % avg_volume
    final_text = final_text + company_name + ": " + formatted_vol + "\n"

print('__RESULT__:')
print(final_text.strip())
